zh.lifeSummary: 當Janet Fleming於1351年出生在蘇格蘭藍納可爾比格亞時，她的父親Sir David Fleming Lord of Biggar21歲，母親Jean Barclay22歲。她於1370年與Sir William Seton 1st Lord Seton在蘇格蘭哈丁頓史爾西頓結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和8個女兒的父母。她去世於1430年在蘇格蘭哈丁頓史爾西頓享年79歲，埋葬在英國蘇格蘭易亞斯特 洛迪安特藍特。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Janet Fleming于1351年出生在苏格兰藍納可爾比格亞时，她的父亲Sir David Fleming Lord of Biggar21岁，母亲Jean Barclay22岁。她于1370年与Sir William Seton 1st Lord Seton在苏格兰哈丁頓史爾西頓结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和8个女儿的父母。她去世于1430年在苏格兰哈丁頓史爾西頓享年79岁，埋葬在英国苏格兰易亞斯特 洛迪安特藍特。

nameMeanings.name: Fleming
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: ethnic name for someone from Flanders, from Middle English fleming. The word reflects a Norman French form of Old French flamanc ‘Fleming’, from the stem flam- + the ancient Germanic suffix -ing. In the Middle Ages there was considerable commercial intercourse between England and the Netherlands, particularly in the wool trade, and many Flemish weavers and dyers settled in England. This surname is also common in south and east Scotland and in Ireland, where it is sometimes found in the Gaelicized form Pléamonn.
German: variant of   Flemming  , cognate with 1 above.

variants.name: Flemings
meanings: Americanized form of Flemish Vleminckx: patronymic from Vleminck, an ethnic name for someone from Flanders, Middle Dutch vleminc.

variants.name: Flanders
meanings: English: ethnic name from Middle English Fla(u)ndres ‘Flanders’, denoting someone from Flanders, a historical region covering parts of modern-day Belgium, France, and the Netherlands. Compare Fleming .

variants.name: Flemming
meanings: German: ethnic name for someone from Flanders, Middle High German vlaeminc. People from Flanders spread throughout Germany, as well as England, in the Middle Ages as clothmakers and dyers.

variants.name: Flamenco
meanings: Spanish: ethnic name from flamenco ‘Fleming, Flemish person’ (see Fleming ).

nameMeanings.name: Janet
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a diminutive of   Jane  , already in common use in the Middle English period. It remained in use in Scotland and in some parts of England well into the 17th century and was revived at the end of the 19th century to much more widespread use, while still retaining its popularity in Scotland. Since the 1960s, however, it has rather gone out of fashion in Britain.

variants.name: Jannet
meanings: Originally a diminutive of   Jane  , already in common use in the Middle English period. It remained in use in Scotland and in some parts of England well into the 17th century and was revived at the end of the 19th century to much more widespread use, while still retaining its popularity in Scotland. Since the 1960s, however, it has rather gone out of fashion in Britain.

en.lifeSummary: When Janet Fleming was born in 1351, in Biggar, Lanarkshire, Scotland, her father, Sir David Fleming Lord of Biggar, was 21 and her mother, Jean Barclay, was 22. She married Sir William Seton 1st Lord Seton in 1370, in Seton, Haddingtonshire, Scotland. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 8 daughters. She died in 1430, in Seton, Haddingtonshire, Scotland, at the age of 79, and was buried in Tranent, East Lothian, Scotland, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Janet Fleming est née en 1351, à Biggar, Lanarkshire, Écosse, son père, Sir David Fleming Lord of Biggar, avait 21 ans et sa mère, Jean Barclay, avait 22 ans. Elle a épousé Sir William Seton 1st Lord Seton en 1370, à Seton, Haddingtonshire, Écosse. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 8 filles. Elle est décédée en 1430, à Seton, Haddingtonshire, Écosse, à l’âge de 79 ans, et a été enterrée à Tranent, East Lothian, Écosse, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Janet Fleming 1351 in Biggar, Lanarkshire, Scotland geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir David Fleming Lord of Biggar 21 und ihre Mutter Jean Barclay 22. Sie hat 1370 in Seton, Haddingtonshire, Scotland Sir William Seton 1st Lord Seton geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 8 Töchter. Sie starb 1430 im Alter von 79 Jahren in Seton, Haddingtonshire, Scotland und wurde in Tranent, East Lothian, Schottland, United Kingdom begraben.

ja.lifeSummary: Janet Flemingが1351年にスコットランドラナルクシュアイアビグガーで生まれた時，父Sir David Fleming Lord of Biggarは21歳，母Jean Barclayは22歳であった。1370年にスコットランドハッドイントンシュアイアセトンでSir William Seton 1st Lord Setonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と8人の娘の親であった。彼女は1430年にスコットランドハッドイントンシュアイアセトンで79歳で死去し，イギリススコットランドエアスト ロスアントランエントにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Janet Fleming(이)가 1351년 스컷랜드 랜아르크실르 비가에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir David Fleming Lord of Biggar(은)는 21세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Jean Barclay(은)는 22세였다. 그녀는 1370년 스컷랜드 하딩토실르 세턴에서 Sir William Seton 1st Lord Seton(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 여덟 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1430년 스컷랜드 하딩토실르 세턴에서 79세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 스코틀랜드 이스트 로스이언 트랜트에 묻혔다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Janet Fleming родилась в 1351 г. в местности бигар, ланаркшир, Шотландия, её отцу по имени Sir David Fleming Lord of Biggar было 21 год, а матери, которую звали Jean Barclay, 22. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir William Seton 1st Lord Seton в 1370 г. в местности сетон, хаддингтоншир, Шотландия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 8 дочерей. Она умерла в 1430 г. в местности сетон, хаддингтоншир, Шотландия в возрасте 79 лет и была похоронена в местности транент, эаст лотян, Шотландия, Великобритания.

Se casó con Sir William Seton 1st Lord Seton en 1370, en Seton, Haddingtonshire, Scotland. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 8 hijas. Murió en 1430, en Seton, Haddingtonshire, Scotland, a la edad de 79 años, y fue sepultada en Tranent, East Lothian, Escocia, Reino Unido.
